title: bursera oerstedii
intro: Bursera oerstedii, also known as the "Oaxacan copal," is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central America, particularly in Mexico and parts of Central America. This tree has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bursera oerstedii include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Bursera oerstedii is often prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and its resin is used in traditional ceremonies for its purifying and protective properties.
